appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Choose a color palette for the app.
appearance.description: Pick a color palette. Your choice is saved on this device and applied across the whole app — background, surfaces, text, accents and charts.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Control external access to your inventory system
apiKeys.label: Label
apiKeys.keyCreated: API key created. Copy it now — it won't be shown again.
apiKeys.rotateConfirm: The current key value will be permanently invalidated.
apiKeys.errorMessage: Could not fetch API keys. Please try again.
apiKeys.emptyDesc: Generate one to enable external widget integrations.
apiKeys.newKeyGenerated: New key generated — copy it now:
apiKeys.keyNotShownAgain: This key will not be shown again.
apiKeys.rotateMessage: Rotate key "{{label}}"? The current key value will be permanently invalidated.
apiKeys.revokeMessage:
Revoke key "{{label}}"?

This will permanently delete the key and immediately break any integrations using it. This cannot be undone.
apiKeys.permissionsHint: Toggle which operations this key can perform.
apiKeys.domainsHint: Press Enter or comma to add. Empty = all origins allowed.
apiKeys.defaultLocationHint: If set, widget skips location selection screen.
apiKeys.successMessage: Here is your new API Key. Please copy it now.
apiKeys.warningNotShown: Warning: This key will not be shown again.

trackingPresets.title: Tracking Presets
trackingPresets.subtitle: Reusable engine configurations for your products
trackingPresets.namePlaceholder: e.g. Fabric by Area, Tool Tracker
trackingPresets.noProductsUsing: No products are using this preset yet. Assign it from a product's edit page.
trackingPresets.errorMessage: Could not fetch tracking presets. Please try again.
trackingPresets.hint: Tracking presets let you create reusable engine configurations. Assign a preset to multiple products so they all behave the same way during stock movements and widget operations. Most users don't need presets until they have many similar products.
trackingPresets.emptyDesc: Presets are optional — products work fine with their default profile settings. Create a preset when you want to customize engine behavior or share settings across multiple products.
trackingPresets.counterHelp: Counter preset — customize step size, labels, negative stock rules
trackingPresets.converterHelp: Converter preset — define unit conversion ratios (e.g., liters to bottles)
trackingPresets.dimensionHelp: Dimension preset — set up formulas for area/volume calculations
trackingPresets.batchHelp: Batch preset — configure allocation strategy (FIFO, LIFO, manual)

engineTypes.counterDesc: Simple add/subtract counting. Configure step size and labels.
engineTypes.converterDesc: Unit conversions with ratios. E.g., liters ↔ bottles.
engineTypes.bucketDesc: Batch allocation strategies. FIFO, LIFO, or manual.
engineTypes.trackerDesc: Individual item status tracking. Define valid state transitions.
engineTypes.timeBasedDesc: Expiry tracking. Shelf life, rental periods.

qrCodes.title: QR Codes
qrCodes.subtitle: Manage scannable codes for your products and locations
qrCodes.selectApiKeyWarning: Please select an API Key before generating QR codes
qrCodes.noApiKeys: No API Keys found. Please create one first.
qrCodes.errorMessage: Could not fetch QR codes. Please try again.
qrCodes.emptyDesc: Generate some using the form above to get started.
qrCodes.linkWorkOrder: Link to Logical Batch / Kit (Work Order)
qrCodes.linkWorkOrderHint: Only select this if you want the QR code to open a specific existing batch. For generic Kit/Batch generation, leave this empty.
qrCodes.deleteConfirm: Delete this QR code? This cannot be undone.

widgetGenerator.title: Widget Generator
widgetGenerator.subtitle: Deploy scanning widgets for your team
widgetGenerator.hint: Widgets let your warehouse team scan QR codes to log inventory movements without accessing this admin panel.
widgetGenerator.keyGrantsAccess: Key grants access to the widget and API.
widgetGenerator.selectKeyToPreview: Select an API key to preview
widgetGenerator.runRequestHint: Click "Run Request" to fetch live data
widgetGenerator.noProductsForKey: No products found for this API key.

widgetPreview.title: Widget Preview
widgetPreview.subtitle: Preview and try the scanning widget for your products
widgetPreview.hint: Pick a product to see the live widget your warehouse team uses to scan and log inventory movements.
widgetPreview.selectProductHelp: The preview reflects how this product's widget behaves when scanned.
widgetPreview.selectProductToPreview: Select a product to preview the widget

tenants.subtitle: The client companies whose inventory and widgets you administer. Enter one to operate its catalog.
tenants.detailsDesc: Provision a new manager company under your account
tenants.emptyDesc: Create your first client company to start populating its catalog and widgets.
tenants.errorMessage: Something went wrong while loading your tenants.
tenants.errorCreatingFallback: Something went wrong while creating the tenant.

export.title: Export Company Data
export.subtitle: Download a full copy of your company's data (GDPR portability)
export.description: Download a ZIP archive containing one JSON file per model (products, movements, locations, batches, suppliers, customers, orders and more) plus a manifest with row counts. Limited to one export per hour.
export.error: Could not export your data. Please try again.
export.rateLimited: Export limit reached (1 per hour). Try again later.
export.docsBody: Integrate the widget and REST API using the interactive OpenAPI docs.

notifications.subtitle: Deliver monitoring alerts via email or signed webhooks
notifications.name: Name
notifications.secretHelp: Payloads are signed with HMAC-SHA256 in the X-PI-Signature header
notifications.headersError: Headers must be a valid JSON object
notifications.eventFilterHelp: Leave both unchecked to receive every event type
notifications.deleteMessage: Delete channel "{{name}}"? Its delivery log is removed too.
notifications.emptyDesc: Add an email or webhook channel to be alerted when a monitoring rule fires — no login needed.
notifications.errorMessage: Could not fetch notification channels. Please retry.
notifications.deliveriesEmpty: No deliveries yet. They appear here once a monitoring rule fires.
notifications.recipientsRequired: At least one recipient is required

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage your company's members and their roles
users.emptyDesc: There are no members in this company yet.
